shared_properties: Pixel edges remain hard with 2px outline weight.
differences: This overlay reserves slots rather than baking changing numbers into one texture.
The composition keeps all painted pixels in the upper-right reading zone.
No red accent pixels appear in the normal score state.

context.usage: Top-right HUD layout for current score and HI score with right-aligned monospaced spacing.

layout_notes: Allocate the left segment for HI and the right segment for current score.
Leave transparent gaps between labels and digit cells for legibility.
Right edge of the rack aligns to x=590 on a 600px canvas.

acceptance_criteria: HI label plus two five-digit fields fit inside the width with at least 6px right margin.
Baseline alignment error across all digit slots stays at 0px.
